targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(MAX(mag), 1) AS max_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(MAX(mag), 1) AS max_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mag), 2) AS avg_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mag), 2) AS avg_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(depth), 1) AS avg_depth_km FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(depth), 1) AS avg_depth_km FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN place LIKE '% of %' THEN SUBSTR(place, INSTR(place, ' of ') + 4) ELSE place END) AS distinct_regions FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN place LIKE '% of %' THEN SUBSTR(place, INSTR(place, ' of ') + 4) ELSE place END) AS distinct_regions FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT DATE(time_utc) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY DATE(time_utc) ORDER BY day
targets.queryText: SELECT DATE(time_utc) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY DATE(time_utc) ORDER BY day

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(CAST(mag AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') AND mag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CAST(mag AS INTEGER) ORDER BY CAST(mag AS INTEGER)
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(CAST(mag AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') AND mag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CAST(mag AS INTEGER) ORDER BY CAST(mag AS INTEGER)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT time_utc, mag, depth, place FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT time_utc, mag, depth, place FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY mag DESC LIMIT 10

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN place LIKE '% of %' THEN SUBSTR(place, INSTR(place, ' of ') + 4) ELSE place END AS region, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(MAX(mag), 2) AS max_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN place LIKE '% of %' THEN SUBSTR(place, INSTR(place, ' of ') + 4) ELSE place END AS region, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(MAX(mag), 2) AS max_mag FROM events WHERE time_utc >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND time_utc <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY region ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
